title: generate() beyond block_size fails with a confusing error
body: CausalSelfAttention registers its causal mask buffer sized to config.block_size in mingpt/model.py; calling model.generate() for more tokens than block_size crashes deep inside attention with a shape mismatch instead of a clear 'sequence length exceeds block_size' message.

title: Trainer has no gradient accumulation option
body: mingpt/trainer.py's training loop calls optimizer.step() after every batch, so training with an effective batch size larger than fits in GPU memory isn't possible without hand-editing the trainer loop.

title: BPE cache location isn't documented, breaks offline runs
body: mingpt/bpe.py downloads and caches the GPT-2 encoder.json/vocab.bpe files on first use to a fixed local path, but there's no documented way to pre-populate this cache for machines without internet access.

title: Adder eval mishandles a carry into a new leading digit
body: projects/adder/adder.py's evaluation compares predicted digit sequences against the ground truth sum, but sums that produce one more digit than either addend (e.g. 99+01=100) appear to be scored incorrectly.
